name: mobilecode-open
description: Mobilecode-open — open-source iOS companion app for opencode serve (Apache-2.0, based on giuliastro/opencode-remote-android)

scripts.sync: cd web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:ios: cd web && npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.open:ios: cd web && npx cap open ios
scripts.test: cd web && npm run test:core && npm run test:ui
